eligibility.account_status: Account must be ACTIVE with completed KYC
eligibility.credit_score: Minimum CIBIL score of 650 required (checked internally)
eligibility.max_loan_amount: Maximum eligible amount is 12 times the declared monthly salary
eligibility.existing_loans: Customers with more than 2 active loans are not eligible for a new loan

interest_rates.emi_calculation: EMI = P × r × (1+r)^n / ((1+r)^n - 1), where r = monthly rate = 12%/12/100

booking_process.step_1: Customer requests loan via /loan/book — eligibility is checked and a booking ID is generated (valid 5 minutes)
booking_process.step_2: OTP is sent to registered email for confirmation
booking_process.step_3: Customer confirms via /loan/confirm with booking ID and OTP
booking_process.step_4: Loan is created in PENDING status and auto-approved within seconds via background process
booking_process.step_5: Loan status changes to ACTIVE after approval

repayment.emi_payment: EMI payments are made via /loan/{loan_id}/pay endpoint
repayment.partial_payment: Minimum payment is the EMI amount; excess reduces outstanding principal
repayment.loan_closure: Loan is marked CLOSED when outstanding balance reaches zero
repayment.prepayment_penalty: No prepayment penalty for personal loans

default_policy.overdue_definition: EMI not paid within 30 days of due date
default_policy.penalty: 2% additional interest per month on overdue EMI
default_policy.npa_classification: Loan classified as NPA after 90 days of non-payment
default_policy.legal_action: Legal proceedings initiated after NPA classification

simulation.description: Customers can simulate loan EMI before booking via /loan/simulate endpoint
simulation.no_commitment: Simulation does not create any loan obligation
